benchmark: K8s AI Agents Real Execution Path — SUPERSEDED
reason: This benchmark measured independent component pings, not a real execution path. Replaced with single-trace Temporal workflow execution.
method: In-Docker network (docker exec node from api-server container)

opa_policy_evaluation_sequential.notes: Real Rego evaluation via HTTP POST to OPA sidecar. All 20 calls denied (expected — agent not in allowlist).

sandbox_health_check_sequential.notes: HTTP health probe to sandbox-runtime. Returns 503 NOT_SERVING (Docker socket not mounted). Measures HTTP transport only.

not_measured: Sandbox creation (Docker socket not mounted in container)
